status.sql: SELECT package_name, COUNT(*) AS package_count FROM (SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(line, 'import\s+([\w\.]+)') AS package_name FROM (SELECT SPLIT(value, '\n') AS lines FROM "SAMPLE_CONTENTS"), LATERAL FLATTEN(input => lines) AS line WHERE line ILIKE 'import%') WHERE package_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY package_name ORDER BY package_count DESC LIMIT 10;
solved_subquestions_list: Extract the top 10 most frequently imported package names from Java source files.
